topic: How to Write the Perfect copilot-instructions.md File
hook: One file can make your Copilot coding agent 10x more effective.
keyTakeaway: A well-crafted copilot-instructions.md gives agents context to pass CI on first try.
talkingPoints: Explain three types: copilot-instructions.md, path-specific files, AGENTS.md
Secret: you can ask Copilot to GENERATE its own instructions
Walk through recommended structure: summary, build commands, validation
Demo: before and after comparison of agent PR quality
Pro tip: include validated bootstrap, build, test, lint commands
trendContext: GitHub Docs now detail three types of custom instructions plus a prompt for Copilot to generate its own instructions.
